scripts.copy-assets: cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/styles.css
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/renderer/app.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/app.js --platform=browser && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --platform=node --external:electron && esbuild src/preload.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/preload.js --platform=node --external:electron
scripts.dev: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle && npm run copy-assets && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron .
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle && npm run copy-assets

extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: This app needs to record your screen.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera.
